sections.changelog:
4.5.3

  • Stronger WP Rocket cache invalidation: rocket_clean_domain + rocket_clean_files + flush_rocket_htaccess + per-post purge for the 50 most recent posts to catch all cache variants

    • 4.5.2

    • Inject player after hero figure when present, fall back to before first paragraph
    • Disable JS mover fallback so player is always server-side rendered

      • 4.5.1

      • Fix: plugin upgrade detection now reads version from partner config

        • 4.5.0

        • WordPress-native server-side injection + WP Rocket page cache purge on upgrade
